entities.name: BARLEY
entities.description: The crop studied, Hordeum vulgar L., in the acidic soils of northwestern Ethiopia

entities.name: LIME
entities.description: A soil amendment used to reduce soil acidity and improve nutrient availability

entities.name: VERMICOMPOST
entities.description: An organic fertilizer used to improve soil fertility and properties

entities.name: SOIL ACIDITY
entities.description: The condition of soil having a low pH, which is a major challenge in northwestern Ethiopia

entities.name: FERTILITY DEPLETION
entities.description: The loss of essential nutrients from the soil

entities.name: NORTHWESTERN ETHIOPIA
entities.description: The geographic region where the study was conducted, specifically the Banja district

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of crop produced per unit area

entities.name: YIELD COMPONENTS
entities.description: The specific attributes that contribute to the overall crop yield

entities.name: SOIL PROPERTIES
entities.description: The chemical and physical characteristics of the soil

entities.name: RANDOMIZED COMPLETE BLOCK DESIGN
entities.description: The experimental design used to lay out the factorial combinations of treatments

entities.name: SOIL PH
entities.description: The measure of acidity or alkalinity of the soil

entities.name: EXCHANGEABLE CALCIUM
entities.description: A measure of available calcium in the soil

entities.name: EXCHANGEABLE SODIUM
entities.description: A measure of available sodium in the soil

entities.name: ORGANIC CARBON
entities.description: The amount of carbon stored in organic matter in the soil

entities.name: EXCHANGEABLE MAGNESIUM
entities.description: A measure of available magnesium in the soil

entities.name: TOTAL NITROGEN
entities.description: The total amount of nitrogen present in the soil

entities.name: AVAILABLE PHOSPHORUS
entities.description: The amount of phosphorus available for plant uptake

entities.name: CATION EXCHANGEABLE CAPACITY
entities.description: The ability of soil to hold and exchange cations

entities.name: POTASSIUM
entities.description: A measure of available potassium in the soil

entities.name: EXCHANGEABLE ACIDITY
entities.description: The measure of acidity caused by exchangeable hydrogen and aluminum ions

entities.name: ALUMINUM
entities.description: A soil element that can be toxic to plants in acidic conditions

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The weight of the harvested grain per unit area
